fields.Name: ListConversationDetailFeedback
fields.UserQuestion: What user ratings and feedback have been left on AI messages?
fields.Description: Lists 1-10 user ratings and free-form feedback on conversation messages, joined with the rater (User), conversation, and agent name. Supports time-range, rating-band, and agent filters.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Queries __mj.ConversationDetail WHERE UserRating IS NOT NULL. Rater is resolved as the parent conversation's owner (Conversation.UserID → User) because there is no per-rating UserID column and server-side write rules restrict rating writes to the conversation owner. Also LEFT JOINs __mj.AIAgent for the agent name. Nunjucks conditionals scope by StartDate/EndDate/MinRating/MaxRating/AgentID. Orders most-recent first by __mj_UpdatedAt.
